navbar.style: Solid background with delicate bottom border: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EAE7E1] sticky top-0 z-50

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D4238] text-white hover:bg-[#3C5749] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F3F1ED] text-[#1C1C19] hover:bg-[#EAE7E1] rounded-full px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-[#F3F1ED] rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-colors text-[#1C1C19]

badges.paid: bg-[#EDF2ED] text-[#4A6B4A] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
badges.pending: bg-[#FDF6EA] text-[#C68B35] rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change background/text color on hover.
interactions_and_motion.animations: Use micro-interactions for feedback. Simple staggered fade-ins for list items.

user_avatar.description: Professional user avatar for the header

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Ensure 'Manrope' and 'IBM Plex Sans' fonts are imported (e.g., via Google Fonts) and configured in tailwind.config.js.
2. Build the single-page dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid pattern (MODE B).
3. Header: Include a Month/Year selector (e.g., `< Select />` or arrow-based navigation), and the user avatar.
4. Cards (Resumo): 4 top-level widgets for Total Entradas, Total Saídas, Saldo, % Comprometido. Use `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4` with tight gaps (`gap-4` or `gap-6`).
5. Main layout: Place the 'Gráfico de barras' spanning 2 columns, and Faturamento/Despesas lists spanning 1 column each, or arrange them logically so every pixel is utilized without jagged bottoms.
6. Faturamento: List items with 'Salary' or 'Award' type. Include an Add button.
7. Despesas: List items with 'Fixed', 'Card', or 'Detached' type, showing 'Paid' or 'Pending' badges. Include Add/Edit buttons.
8. Modals: Use Shadcn Dialog for the small Add/Edit modals for Faturamento and Despesas.
10. CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, selects, dialog triggers) in kebab-case.
